About Harmony Clinic

Harmony Homoeopathy & Physiotherapy Clinic offers integrated healthcare for day-to-day health problems, chronic complaints, pain conditions and functional rehabilitation.

Our consultation style focuses on understanding the root cause, medical history, lifestyle, stress, symptoms and treatment expectations before planning care.

Open on all 6 days other than Tuesday.

Advance appointment is recommended for better consultation time and reduced waiting.

Meet Our Doctors

Two dedicated doctors, one trusted clinic, and a practical approach to patient care.

Dr. Sourabh S. Dasoondi & Dr. Yogita Singh Homoeopathy · Male Wellness · Physiotherapy Care
SS

Dr. Sourabh Singh Dasoondi

BHMS · Homoeopathy Physician · Men’s Health & Wellness Care

Focuses on detailed case-taking and individualized homoeopathic care for male problems, GIT concerns, fertility-related problems, piles, acidity and chronic health issues.

  • Confidential consultation for male wellness concerns.
  • Root-cause oriented assessment and follow-up.
  • Patient-first, ethical and practical care planning.
YS

Dr. Yogita Singh

MPT Neurology · Physiotherapy & Advanced Pain Relief

Provides physiotherapy care for pain, posture, mobility, neurological and musculoskeletal conditions using modern rehabilitation methods.

  • Physiotherapy assessment with functional goals.
  • Spine, knee, shoulder, sports injury and neuro rehab care.
  • Home exercise guidance for long-term results.
